title: Keep About page as living dependency inventory with automated sync check
description:
The About page (WebUI.Blazor/wwwroot/about.html) is the canonical inventory of third-party dependencies. Ensure it stays accurate:

1. Add a script (Scripts/Verify-AboutDeps.ps1) that extracts top-level packages from all .csproj files and compares against the about.html table.
2. Run this script in CI (part of TSK-0144).
3. Update about.html to include all current deps with correct license info (done Sprint 51).
4. Add a reminder comment in WebUI.Blazor.csproj that adding a PackageReference requires updating about.html.

Acceptance: Script detects drift between csproj and about.html; CI fails on drift.
councilFinding: About page was missing 10 of 17 dependencies before Sprint 51 fix.
